## WORK EXPERIENCE

### Senior QA Engineer – Enterprise Platforms | PayAsia by Deel
**01/2022 – 04/2026** | Remote (APAC)

Scope: Enterprise HRIS/Payroll serving 500+ client companies and ~200K end users; ~$2.5B+ annual payroll transactions

- Reduced defect escape rate from 8% → 2% via risk‑based regression and acceptance gates (95% coverage across core workflows)
- Built PHP automation suite (250+ cases); cut manual effort 80h → 12h per release; enabled bi‑weekly releases (from monthly)
- Standardized QA templates and evidence, improving first‑time readiness and reducing defect resolution time from ~8d → ~2d
- Strengthened data accuracy controls (200+ fields) achieving ~99.95% reconciliation; prevented 28 post‑release data issues
- Coordinated QA/Dev/Product across releases; improved developer satisfaction by 18 pts through clearer quality gates

### Software Test Analyst | FIS Global
**06/2016 – 01/2022** | [Location]

Scope: Mainframe credit card clearing (50M+ tx/year), legacy COBOL; 99.99% uptime; PCI‑DSS audit readiness

- Modernized legacy testing from manual to ~80% automated; reduced testing costs ~50% while sustaining quality SLAs
- Detected and resolved 45 performance bottlenecks; prevented 3 potential outages impacting ~200K users
- Led PCI‑DSS validation across 5 modules; zero critical findings over 3 consecutive regulatory audits
- Mentored 4 QA engineers in mainframe/COBOL practices; authored documentation standards adopted across 3 enterprise accounts
- Produced test strategies and risk reports; aligned testing timelines to release schedules with clear acceptance criteria

### Software Engineering Analyst | Accenture
**05/2013 – 04/2015** | [Location]

Scope: Telecommunications; 3‑tier web and backend systems; middleware/performance focus

- Designed functional and performance test cases; enabled repeatable validation across environments with managed test data

- Provided Tier‑1 support for HP ALM/LoadRunner; documented best practices and troubleshooting guides for wider QA teams
